findings.description: Global current_phase can conflict across sessions; phase is session-specific.
findings.title: current_phase stored globally rather than per session
findings.suggested_issue: Move current_phase into session progress or namespace by active_session_id.

findings.description: learn:update-progress validates plan but not progress; progress shape may drift.
findings.title: Progress schema missing (progress.json written without validation)
findings.suggested_issue: Add learn-progress schema and validate progress writes.

findings.description: learn:plan uses Write()/Bash() for session files directly, bypassing CLI lock and atomic write helpers.
findings.title: learn:plan bypasses lock-protected CLI APIs for session file writes
findings.suggested_issue: Add CLI endpoints for session create/write (atomic + lock) and have plan use them.

findings.description: Duplication between CLI and docs will drift.
findings.title: CLI provides learn:list-profiles but docs re-implement listing
